parsed_review.review: Law Firm OS Closeout Pack CP00-081 - Failure Edge Recovery Opening (Claude C00 read-only)
parsed_review.summary: Clean, internally consistent metadata-only opening pack. It consumes the CP00-080 result via the real upstream assembler, opens and closes RP00.P07.M00.S01-S03 and RP00.P07.M01.S01-S03, and binds missing-tenant/missing-actor failure contracts plus recovery-path and incident-traceability contracts. All runtime, recovery, incident, observability, audit, permission-engine, product-state, and LDIP boundaries are encoded as false and enforced via a fail-closed claim gate and forbidden-claim list. No P0/P1; only P3 observations.

findings.title: CP00-080 README bullet rewritten to reflect P06 completion / handoff to RP00.P07.M00.S01
findings.evidence: README diff corrects stale CP00-080 next boundary text to RP00.P07.M00.S01, aligning with CP00-080 module and CP00-081 start.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm in closeout-pack-plan that RP00.P06.M10 terminates at S03 so no subphases are skipped.

findings.title: Plan alignment for CP00-081 not independently verifiable from diff
findings.evidence: Policy/contract assert plan values, while plan JSON is not in the review diff and final evidence gates were not yet created pre-review.
findings.recommended_action: Ensure rp00:control-plane:validate and closeout-pack:validate CP00-081 pass green after evidence creation.

findings.title: Duplicated contract-definition blocks; only nested result and a field subset are asserted
findings.evidence: Top-level descriptive fields could silently drift from policy/result without additional assertions.
findings.recommended_action: Add equality assertions for duplicated top-level definition blocks against policy.

parsed_review.production_ready_assessment: Acceptable for this gate. production_ready denotes a metadata-only contract/planning artifact, not runtime failure recovery; no runtime behavior, real data, or secrets are introduced.
